creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #2)
> Possibly, what's the reason? It doesn't seem to fit the normal merge criteria:

Bug fixes [1,2] are one of the merge criteria from that list.
Besides we are only 10 days into 2018Q4 and merging it now should
not cause any trouble.

It's also for convenience.  The new clear-screen editing command
is something that I'd like to use now rather than wait 3 months for
the OpenBSD 6.4 and FreeBSD gap to close.

[1] https://github.com/openbsd/src/commits/master/bin/ksh
[2] https://github.com/ibara/oksh/compare/bb1108a6464f947d991340bf2ae0598438bb13cd...20181009
